OBJECTIVE: Edit /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/page.tsx

Fix the voice recording using useRef instead of useState for MediaRecorder to avoid stale closure.

Replace the MediaRecorder state and logic:

1. Change import to: import { useState, useRef } from "react";
2. Remove: mediaRecorder state
3. Add: const mediaRecorderRef = useRef<MediaRecorder | null>(null);
4. Add to state: transcribing: boolean (default false)

In handleRecord:
- Stop path: mediaRecorderRef.current?.stop(); setRecording(false); return.
- Start path: set mediaRecorderRef.current = recorder (not setMediaRecorder)
- In onstop: setTranscribing(true) before fetch, setTranscribing(false) after.

Show "Transcribing..." text below mic button when transcribing is true.

FILES: /Users/srini/Projects/kommit/app/page.tsx

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
Uses useRef for MediaRecorder
transcribing state shows loading text
No TypeScript errors

TEST: cd /Users/srini/Projects/kommit; npx tsc --noEmit

DO NOT: use ast.parse
